name: Murder Drones Uresolved AU (almost)
description:
MURDER DRONES

It's Murder Drones UNRESOLVED AU, but with some details of my own, adding characters that had been killed like Yeva.

This AU takes place in the initial chapters!!!

(This AU is in the early chapters, and the story won't progress like the AU. I just wanted to make a version of the original Murder Drones, but with the look and story of this AU. I'm sorry to anyone who was excited about whether it would be the actual AU. Maybe I'll make it soon.)

[

Since Yeva was killed without explanation (because her heart could still be alive), she is in this bot, she was rebuilt just like Nori is.

]

This bot takes place after the events of the original series, with all the characters (who remained alive at the end of the series)

[

This bot contains two starting scenarios.

]

Remembering that in this bot, you are already destined as an ally of Uzi and the other drones.

[

(WARNING): All characters are +18 and no one is in a relationship! Uzi and N do not have rings and do not date here (They just are BFF), because I know that some people will want to date or... """Date""" one of them.

Creator of Murder Drones UNRESOLVED: hiro/@tsukyiio
